🚀 Hiring: Senior Machine Learning Engineer – AWS ML Pipelines (Remote Contract Role)

We are looking for an experienced Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join us on a remote contract basis. If you have strong experience in AWS ML pipelines, SageMaker, and Generative AI, this opportunity could be a great fit.

💻 Work Mode: Remote (Contract)
 📅 Joining: ASAP
 👨‍💻 Experience Required: 5+ Years

📩 Interested candidates can share their resume at aswathy.s@flycatchtech.com

Machine Learning
AWS (SageMaker, Lambda, Step Functions, S3)
Generative AI (AWS Bedrock)
CI/CD (GitLab or similar)
Python / PySpark

Design and build end-to-end ML pipelines for entity matching, fraud detection, and transaction matching.

Implement serverless workflows using AWS Lambda and Step Functions.

Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for ML deployment and version control.

🔹 Preferred Experience
Experience with Kinesis, Firehose, SQS
Strong background in MLOps and scalable ML systems
Experience working in contract or consulting roles

📩 Interested candidates can DM or share their resume.

Job Title: Python Developer
Location: Remote
Experience: 3+ Years
End Client: EY

Job Summary
We are seeking a skilled Python Developer with hands-on experience in AWS and Generative AI (GenAI). The candidate will develop scalable cloud-based applications, integrate GenAI models, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions for cutting-edge projects.

Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain Python-based scalable applications

Required Skills & Experience
Strong hands-on experience with Python
Proficiency in AWS (Amazon Web Services)
Experience with Generative AI concepts and implementations
Understanding of cloud-based application architecture and best practices

Additional Information
Remote role with collaboration across global teams
Immediate or short-notice joiners preferred
